perturbation.original_text: Any engagement to perform COOL TECH Services shall be on such terms and conditions as COOL TECH may approve at its sole discretion.
perturbation.changed_text: Any engagement to perform COOL TECH Services shall be on such terms and conditions as VET TECH may approve at its sole discretion.
perturbation.explanation: This change shifts the authority to approve the terms and conditions of COOL TECH Services engagements from COOL TECH to VET TECH. This contradicts the general understanding that each company controls its own services. Specifically, it creates a contradiction in ARTICLE III, which states that VET TECH has responsibility for client relationships for clients it bills directly, but does not grant it control over the terms of COOL TECH's services.
perturbation.location: ARTICLE I. SCOPE OF STRATEGIC ALLIANCE. A.
perturbation.contradicted_location: ARTICLE I. SCOPE OF STRATEGIC ALLIANCE. A.
perturbation.contradicted_text: COOL TECH shall, in a professional manner, take all steps necessary to market and produce its Mobile Generation Program and its other services (collectively the "COOL TECH Services") for clients referred to COOL TECH by VET TECH. Any engagement to perform COOL TECH Services shall be on such terms and conditions as VET TECH may approve at its sole discretion. COOL TECH will perform, schedule, staff and manage all COOL TECH Services or with COOL TECH/VET TECH approved team. Notwithstanding the foregoing, VET TECH may, at its election, bill the client directly for COOL TECH Services and under such circumstances COOL TECH shall bill VET TECH the pre-agreed amount for the engagement as adjusted by any client-approved change orders. For any Government Sales brought by VET TECH COOL TECH agrees to be held to the same billing and payment terms as is dictated under the Federal Acquisition Regulation (FAR) guidelines and requirements; otherwise, COOL TECH will bill the client directly. VET TECH agrees to include reference to COOL TECH in each contract and proposal involving COOL TECH Services. COOL TECH's Mobile Generation ("MG"), and other proprietary information and associated products, copyrights, trademarks, trade names and logos developed by COOL TECH shall remain the property of COOL TECH and reference to COOL TECH's rights shall be made in all uses of such materials in at least 12 point type. 1
perturbation.justification: The changed text gives VET TECH the authority to approve the terms and conditions of COOL TECH services. The contradicted text explicitly states that COOL TECH will perform, schedule, staff and manage all COOL TECH Services. By giving VET TECH the power to approve terms and conditions, the changed text contradicts COOL TECH's stated control over its own services. This creates a structural flaw in that the responsibility is switched from COOL TECH (the original text) to VET TECH (the changed text) which directly contradicts the idea that COOL TECH has the authority over its services.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement shall be automatically renewed for successive one year periods unless either party gives written notice of termination to the other party at least thirty (30) days prior to the date of expiration.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement shall be automatically renewed for successive one year periods unless either party gives written notice of termination to the other party at least one (1) day prior to the date of expiration.
perturbation.explanation: Reducing the notice period for termination from 30 days to 1 day creates a conflict with the reasonable expectations for winding down a strategic alliance. This short notice period severely limits the time for either party to make necessary adjustments or find alternative solutions, potentially leading to disputes. This short notice period creates a contradiction of how much time will be given for renewal termination.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement shall be effective as of the date first set forth above and, shall expire on the later of (i) five (5) years from the date hereof, or (ii) with respect to any projects identified in any contract for which VET TECH is billing the client directly, upon the completion of COOL TECH's Services and receipt of payment by COOL TECH from VET TECH for said services. This Agreement shall be automatically renewed for successive one year periods unless either party gives written notice of termination to the other party at least one (1) day prior to the date of expiration. Notwithstanding the foregoing, this Agreement shall be earlier terminated (x) by mutual agreement of the parties, or (y) at any time upon sixty (60) days advance written notice to the other party. Time is of the essence in this Agreement. 2
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the notice period for termination from 30 days to 1 day. The contradicted text contains the clause: 'This Agreement shall be automatically renewed for successive one year periods unless either party gives written notice of termination to the other party at least one (1) day prior to the date of expiration. Notwithstanding the foregoing, this Agreement shall be earlier terminated (x) by mutual agreement of the parties, or (y) at any time upon sixty (60) days advance written notice to the other party.' The introduction of 'one (1) day' notice for the automatic renewal termination clause directly contradicts the 'sixty (60) days advance written notice' clause, as it creates conflicting deadlines for terminating the agreement, thus fitting the definition of Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction: 'Inconsistencies also lead to **in-text contradictions** when **different sections of a contract provide conflicting deadlines, obligations, or penalties**.'
